output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel ?medal ?medalLabel WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 ; wdt:P3466 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P31 wd:Q366645 .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  ?medal rdfs:label ?medalLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en' && LANG(?medalLabel) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 20
output.answer:
The highest military medals in various countries include:
- Medal of Honor (United States)
- Victoria Cross (United Kingdom)
- Legion of Honour (France)
- Star of the Order of the White Rose (Finland)
These medals are the highest military decorations according to Wikidata, as they are linked to their respective countries via the highest military decoration property.
